_metadata.source: OPM Transparency in Healthcare Public Use Files
_metadata.notes: 2026 FEHB plan benefits data — deductibles, OOP max, copays, pharmacy tiers, Medicare coordination, therapy, maternity, and more. Each plan has in-network and out-of-network rows.

_fields_note: Dollar amounts are stored as strings (e.g. '$500') to preserve original formatting including percentages and combined values. Null means not applicable or not covered.

plans.plan_name: Altius Health Plans (Aetna Health of Utah, Inc.)

medicare_coordination.part_b_reimbursement_details: $750 per year for a Self Only enrollment or $1,500 per year for a Self Plus One or Family enrollment for members enrolled in a HRA plan from their fund.
